result.stdout:
Usage: zipcode [options] <folder-to-zip | file-to-unzip>

Options:
  -h|--help		Display help.
  --exe			Include exe/dll files.
  --nodate		Do not include time/date in filename.
  --overwrite		Overwrites an existing zip.
  --unzip		Unzips the file into a local folder.
  --version		Version of zipcode.

folder-to-zip:
  The local folder to zip.

file-to-unzip:
  The local folder to zip.
